---
title: "Turns out, the FA Cup Final hasn't always been played after the final league fixture"
author: "John Knight"
date: 2026-05-15
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
description: "Exploring the effect of travel distance, time zones and climate." 
format:
  html:
    title-block-categories: true
categories: ["football", "statistics", "FA Cup"]
execute: 
  echo: false
eval: true
message: false
warning: false
engine: knitr
editor: source
image: azteca.jpg
draft: true
---

*Intro. 2026. Abomination. Should be showpiece, always has been. But is this true?*

*Show the big PNG. Can I make this more viewer-friendly?*

*Discuss particular years or eras. Give examples and reasons e.g. postponements, Hillsborough.*

*Also mention overall trend towards later finals.*

*Mention the stats and show table.*

*Conclusion; not true. Nelson Mandela effect?*
